title: Wooden Utensil Set - 10 Pcs Teak Wooden Spoon Kitchen Utensils Set for Nonstick Pans & Cookware. Non-Scratch, Heat Resistant, Comfortable Grip. Includes Cooking Spatula
features: WHAT’S INCLUDED?: The only set that includes 10 COOKING UTENSILS that meet all your cooking needs. Set includes flat frying spatula, wok spatula, slotted spatula, spaghetti pasta server, serving spoon, mixing spoon, soup ladle spoon, skimmer spoon, seasoning/oil spoon and salad fork. This set is a perfect blend of beauty and function among your kitchen accessories.

LIFELONG QUALITY: Woodenhouse kitchen utensils set will last a lifetime, they are made of one piece 100% Natural Teak Wood. These tools are beautiful, solid, sturdy, smooth, well designed and have a superb finish. Spoon set will definitely not crack, melt or smell. Utensils may vary in shade because of its natural material.

SAFE & HEALTHY TO USE: This cooking utensils set has a smooth surface that's comfortable to hold and stir. Our wooden kitchen utensils set is non-reactive and will not transfer any chemical or metallic taste to your food. Unlike metal spoons, our wooden spoons for cooking and kitchen spatula set do not scratch the pots and pans you use because of their smooth texture. A safe choice for anyone seeking non-toxic cookware.

EASY TO CLEAN: Our wooden spoon set is nonstick and easy to clean with warm or soapy water. They will fit perfectly in your kitchen decor and will not take much space. This set is just the right size.

PERFECT GIFT FOR HOME CHEFS: Experience the joy of cooking with wooden utensils set - crafted for comfort and safety, these wooden spoons are ideal gift for Christmas, housewarmings, weddings, birthdays, and more.
